normalEvents.text: {A} forgot their homework and blamed the printer.
{A} started a group project and did 0% of it.
{A} got sent to the office for being disruptive.
{A} found forbidden cafeteria food.
{A} challenged {B} to a hallway race, tripping over their own backpack.
{A} accused {B} of copying homework. {B} was definitely copying.
{A} became class president by promising longer lunch.
{A} joined a mysterious after-school club.
{A} got caught using ChatGPT for an essay. The essay was about why AI is dangerous.
{A} gave a presentation with exactly 1 slide. It just said 'trust me bro'.
{A} tried to sneak out of class through the ceiling tiles.
{A} convinced {B} that the water fountain has healing properties.
{A} submitted a blank test with their name written very confidently.
{A} started a petition to replace math with vibes.
{A} ate {B}'s lunch and felt no remorse.
{A} raised their hand to ask a question that was literally just answered.
{A} printed their homework in size 16 font to meet the page requirement.
{A} was caught texting in class. The teacher read it aloud. It was about the teacher.
{A} asked to go to the nurse and returned three periods later looking refreshed.
{A} snitched on {B} for no reason other than pure instinct.
{A} fell asleep in class and woke up in a different subject.
{A} brought an emotional support energy drink to school and got it confiscated.
{A} called the teacher 'mum' and has not recovered.
{A} lost their phone for a week after it went off during a fire drill.
{A} rewrote the school anthem to be about themselves.
{A} claimed {B}'s science experiment as their own. It exploded anyway.
{A} organised a walkout but only they showed up.
{A} discovered the substitute teacher is actually a student in a coat.
{A} spent all of maths drawing a highly detailed portrait of {B}.
{A} joined drama club purely to escape an exam.

followUpEvents.text: {A} abuses presidential power and bans all homework. The teachers weep.
{A} builds a black market lunch empire out of contraband pizza rolls.
{A} returns from the mysterious club more powerful than before. Nobody asks questions.
{A} returns from the office with forbidden knowledge of the school's secrets.
{A} leaks the secrets to the school newspaper. Chaos reigns.
{A} installs a vending machine in the principal's office using executive privilege.
{A} discovers the forbidden food grants temporary invincibility. Probably.
{A} reveals the mysterious club was a stock trading ring. They are rich now.
{A} blackmails the vice principal with the secrets. Tastefully.
{A} has spent so much time in the office they now have their own chair.

randomEvents.text: {A} found $2 under a desk.
{A} became the hallway NPC, giving the same vague directions to everyone.
{A} started a cult around a calculator. It only displays 69.
{A} built a pencil crossbow during study hall.
{A} forgot what class they were in and attended chemistry instead of gym.
{A} found the source code of the school system and stared into the abyss.
{A} made eye contact with the substitute teacher and immediately regretted it.
{A} tried to sell homework answers for $5 each.
{A} launched a pyramid scheme involving cafeteria loyalty cards.
{A} became a tutor for subjects they haven't taken yet.
{A} convinced {B} to invest in their NFT collection of badly drawn fish.
{A} accidentally started a food fight and watched from a safe distance.
{A} ran for hall monitor solely for the power.
{A} discovered a vending machine glitch and exploited it mercilessly.
{A} turned in someone else's essay from 2003. Got a B+.
{A} spent three hours in the bathroom to avoid a test.
{A} organized a betting pool on the spelling bee.
{A} attempted to domesticate the school pigeons.
{A} brought a microwave to school and charged students $1 per use.
{A} discovered the teachers' lounge and emerged changed.
{A} found an unmarked key and has been trying doors all week.
{A} set their ringtone to the school bell and caused a mass exodus from maths.
{A} sold 'premium air' from outside the school in labelled zip-lock bags.
{A} convinced {B} to carry their bag all day by claiming a wrist injury.
{A} found $20 in a library book from 1987.
{A} ran an underground tuck shop out of their locker.
{A} forged a doctor's note so convincingly the nurse framed it.
{A} claimed to be an exchange student for three weeks. Nobody questioned it.
{A} accidentally joined the robotics team. The robot now answers to {A}.
{A} bet {B} $10 they couldn't stay silent for a whole period. {B} failed immediately.
{A} started a rumour about a secret underground level beneath the gym. Three students are still looking.
{A} somehow got on the morning announcements and read their manifesto.
{A} renamed every textbook in their bag after an anime character.
{A} was caught on vegetable r34 (yeah pudding, hop off)
{A} was simping on {B} and was exiled from the friend group.
{A} found a wallet on the floor and forgot it on the bus.
{A} found a wallet on the bus.
{A} confessed their love to {B} and was rejected so bad even the teachers felt bad
{A} confessed their love to {B} and somehow succeeded
{A} was simping on {B} and was exiled from the friend group.
{A} was simping on {B} and was exiled from the friend group.
{A} was simping on {B} and was exiled from the friend group.
{A} was caught on vegetable r34 (yeah pudding, hop off)
{A} demanded rights and was rejected. {B} felt bad and gave them $20

shopItems.name: Stapler
shopItems.description: Industrial grade. Do not aim at face.

shopItems.name: Wet Floor Sign
shopItems.description: A warning and a weapon simultaneously.

shopItems.name: Recorder Flute
shopItems.description: The sound alone deals 5 psychic damage.

shopItems.name: Trebuchet
shopItems.description: The superior siege weapon. No contest.

shopItems.name: Portal Gun
shopItems.description: Results may vary. Void where prohibited.

shopItems.name: Administrative Access
shopItems.description: Root access to the school mainframe.

shopItems.name: Timetable of Doom
shopItems.description: Schedules the opponent for 8am PE every day forever.

shopItems.name: Banned Energy Drink
shopItems.description: Confiscated from the canteen. Still works.

shopItems.name: Nurse's Hall Pass
shopItems.description: Skip class AND recover HP. Peak resource.

shopItems.name: Protein Bar
shopItems.description: Tastes like cardboard. Smells like victory.

shopItems.name: First Aid Kit
shopItems.description: Stolen from the sports shed. Fully stocked.

shopItems.name: Chocolate Milk Carton
shopItems.description: The nectar of primary school gods.

shopItems.name: Teacher's Coffee Mug
shopItems.description: Stolen from the staffroom. Dangerously strong. Fully restores focus.

shopItems.name: Nurse's Mystery Pill
shopItems.description: Nobody knows what it is. It fixes everything.

shopItems.name: Anime girl
shopItems.description: Why is bro buying waifus, what a weirdo

combatEvents.text: {A} slaps {B} across the knuckles with a ruler like it's 1952.
{A} staples something to {B}. Nobody looks too closely at what.
{A} unloads an entire magazine of Nerf darts directly into {B}'s face.
{A} draws a unibrow on {B} during class. The psychological damage is permanent.
{A} challenges {B} to a duel and shows no mercy.
{A} throws the 7-only calculator at {B}. It shows 7 on impact.
{A} deploys a stapler-armed drone against {B}. It beeps menacingly.
{A} sends {B} flying down the hallway inside a shopping cart.
{A} hits {B} with the skateboard and grinds away in shame.
{A} bludgeons {B} with a 4kg gaming laptop. The RGB stays on.
{A} releases the goose on {B}. The goose needs no further instruction.
{A} launches {B} from the trebuchet. Nobody catches them.
{A} idles the tank toward {B}. They flee. They are too slow.
{A} fires a cannonball from the pirate ship at {B}. It hits. It always hits.
{A} activates the mech suit's combat protocols and targets {B}.
{A} fires the portal gun at {B}. {B} appears 40 feet in the air. Briefly.
{A} opens a terminal, types three commands, and {B} simply ceases to exist in the school records.
{A} places the wet floor sign directly in {B}'s path. Physics does the rest.
{A} plays hot cross buns directly into {B}'s ear at maximum volume.
{A} threatens {B} with the pointy end of a maths compass. {B} takes it seriously.
{A} flashes the hall monitor badge and puts {B} under citizen's detention.
{A} rides the wheely chair full speed into {B}. No brakes. No regrets.
{A} hoses {B} down with the fire extinguisher. There was no fire.
{A} erases {B} from the whiteboard of reality. Mostly.
{A} slides {B} a timetable. {B} reads it and loses the will to continue.

adminEvents: {A} uses Administrative Access to delete all of {B}'s grades. They never existed academically.
{A} extends lunch period to 6 hours using root access. Everyone wins except the teachers.
{A} disables gravity in the east wing. {B} does not adapt quickly.
{A} removes {B} from existence using a single DELETE query.
{A} sets {B}'s GPA to negative infinity and logs off.
{A} reassigns {B} to a school that doesn't exist in a postcode that doesn't exist.
{A} overwrites {B}'s timetable with 9 consecutive periods of PE.
{A} sets {B}'s emergency contact to the school itself. Nobody is coming.
{A} changes {B}'s name in the system to 'Student Error 404'.
portalEvents: {A} opens a portal beneath {B}'s feet. {B} exits through the ceiling.
{A} portals {B} into the principal's office mid-sentence.
{A} accidentally portals themselves into {B}'s sandwich. {B} eats it.
{A} creates a portal loop. {B} runs forever.
{A} portals {B} directly into double maths with no context.
{A} opens a portal to the staff car park. {B} lands on the vice principal's car.
{A} misfires the portal gun and both {A} and {B} end up in the lost property bin.
deathMessages: Crushed by a pile of overdue assignments.
Lost a prolonged fight against the school Wi-Fi.
Evaporated during a particularly intense PE session.
Consumed by the lost property pile in DL1.
Failed the vibe check administered by the hallway monitor.
Asked to go to the bathroom in 2nd period and never returned.
Ratioed by the teacher's red pen. Zero survivors.
Opened a school Chromebook and experienced a catastrophic explosion.
Fell into the recycling bin of history.
Eaten by the cafeteria's Thursday mystery meal.
Succumbed to the existential weight of a mandatory assembly.
Buried under participation trophies.
Accidentally joined the wrong Google Classroom and failed a class they didn't attend.
Deleted from the attendance system. Legally never existed.
Caught in the crossfire of a parent-teacher conference.
Lost their soul during standardized testing.
Tripped over a charging cable and achieved escape velocity.
Transformed into a hall pass and never transformed back.
Voted out of existence by the student council.
Disintegrated after making eye contact with the lunch lady on a bad day.
Perished trying to fix the projector before class started.
Accidentally stapled to the bulletin board and forgotten.
Sent to in-school suspension and never located again.
Achieved negative attendance and winked out of reality.
Gooned too hard.
Gooned too hard.
Gooned too hard.
Was found in the sewers pretending to be TMNT
Scheduled for a free period that turned out to be a void.
Finished an exam early and was not seen again.
Made the mistake of correcting the teacher in front of everyone.
Sat in the wrong seat on the first day and never recovered their identity.
Left on read by the group chat and faded from relevance.
Called the teacher mum and died from embarrassment.
Got their headphones confiscated and lost the will to live.
Photocopied themselves by accident during media class. Neither copy survived.
Tripped on the oval during cross country. The race continued without them.
Asked a question during the last five minutes of class. Did not survive the reaction.

healEvents.text: {A} visits the nurse complaining of a 'stomach ache' and leaves suspiciously well.
{A} finds a stash of snacks hidden behind the gym bleachers and helps themselves.
{A} meditates in the library for an entire free period. Unironically helps.
{A} skips PE by hiding in a bathroom cubicle and emerges surprisingly refreshed.
{A} drinks directly from the water fountain for three minutes straight.
{A} sweet-talks the canteen lady into an extra serve. The extra serve was massive.
{A} naps through double maths and wakes up a new person.
{A} does exactly one (1) push-up during PE and calls it a full recovery session.
{A} finds a vending machine restock and clears out the healthy options. Questionable, but effective.
{A} receives an unsolicited hug from the school counsellor. It works.
{A} discovers the staff fridge and helps themselves to someone's clearly labelled yoghurt.
{A} sits in the sun during lunch and simply absorbs vitality like a lizard.
{A} gets peer-pressured into eating someone's leftover birthday cake. No complaints.
{A} calls their mum to complain about school. She says 'just drink some water'. It works.
{A} spends recess doing absolutely nothing and recovers at an alarming rate.

baseCombatMessages: {A} corners {B} by the lockers and makes their point physically.
{A} and {B} settle their group project disagreement the old-fashioned way.
{A} has had enough of {B}'s attitude in the group chat.
{A} challenges {B} to a 1v1 outside the library. No spectators. Only consequences.
{A} ambushes {B} during passing period. A true coward. A true winner.
{A} duelled {B} and aimed for the crotch
{A} throws {B}'s bag onto the roof and then throws {B} up after it.
{A} and {B} have an argument that escalates with terrifying speed.
{A} body-slams {B} in the middle of the canteen queue. The lunch lady sees nothing.
{A} sends {B} a strongly worded note that turns physical very quickly.
{A} uses {B} as a demonstration prop during an unsanctioned self-defence lesson.
